summary: Modified src/components/CTA.astro to increase the Julian Kusi logo size in the CTA section.
Updated HTML width attribute from 200 to 280 (with proportional height from 60 to 84).
Also enhanced drop-shadow filter slightly: from drop-shadow(0 2px 12px rgba(200,138,62,0.25)) to drop-shadow(0 2px 16px rgba(200,138,62,0.3)) for better visual balance at larger size.
Astro build completed successfully with 0 errors.
Mobile layout is unaffected — .cta-deco is hidden via existing @media (max-width: 900px) rule.
